title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Anthony, Sheriff Bartlett, Virginia Rue, Monsieur Le Mon, and Bill discuss the connection between a mysterious package held by a man named Pedro and the memoirs of the Count of Stapleton. Anthony reveals that McGrath, who provided him with the manuscript, claimed to know the location of the "Light of Heaven" diamond. McGrath also stated that the thugs who attacked him were from the court of King Victor, a detail that suggests a new motive for the murder of Prince Michael.

Le Mon reveals that the man previously identified as Prince Nikolai of Hesse-Lobenstein is actually a fraud named Prince Viktor. This individual recently fled the United States following a major oil rights scam, and Le Mon believes Viktor has come to England to target Chimney House.

Le Mon then describes his recent investigation at the villa, where he witnessed a silhouette inside the room where Prince Michael was killed. The intruder was seen disassembling two armor figures and tapping on a panel beneath a portrait. When Bill arrived, the intruder extinguished a flashlight and escaped through a window. Le Mon explains that he had jumped through the window himself to avoid detection, which resulted in a chase where Bill and Virginia mistook him for the intruder. Le Mon suggests the intruder might be impersonating a servant, possibly Boris Anskuov. Anthony dismisses the immediate threat of the intruder, noting that his new servant approached him voluntarily. The group concludes their discussion as dawn approaches.
